channel.title: AimFast.Dev — Articles
channel.description: Deep-dive signal analysis for indie developers. Weekly articles translating cross-platform signals into buildable opportunities.

item.title: "A 34-Point Signal That Took Me 3 Days to Decipher — Full Breakdown"
item.description: "Tuesday night, I stumbled across an HN post: Show HN: Kage – Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing. 683 upvotes, 137 comments,..."

item.title: "一个 34 分的信号，我花了 3 天想清楚它值不值——完整拆解"
item.description: "周二晚上，我刷到了一条 HN 帖子：Show HN: Kage – Shadow any website to a single binary for offline viewing。683 个赞，137 条评论，参与度 957。按照我们情报科的打分系统，它得了 34 分——跨平台只有 1 分（只在 HN..."

item.title: "Code Review Tools Can't Make Money? Alibaba Open-Sourced One, But the Real Opportunity Lies in Reverse"
item.description: "English Slug: code-review-tools-are-dead-wrong-opportunity"

item.title: "代码评审工具赚不到钱？阿里巴巴开源了一个，但真正的机会在反向"
item.description: "周二下午，我盯着 GitHub Trending 面板，看到一个熟悉又陌生的名字冲了上来：alibaba/open-code-review。"

item.title: "What 270K Stars Taught Me: You Don't Need Garry Tan's Toolchain — You Need Anti-Tools"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, a GitHub repo's star count jumped to 109,806. Named gstack, by Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan. He open-sourced his entire Claude Code setup —..."

item.title: "27 万星标教我的事：你不需要 Garry Tan 的工具链，你需要的是反工具"
item.description: "周二下午，GitHub 上一个 repo 的 star 数跳到了 109,806。名字叫 gstack，作者是 Y Combinator 的 CEO Garry Tan。他把自己用的 Claude Code 配置——23 个工具——全部开源了。3 天之内，fork 数 16,322，综合讨论量突破 27 万。"

item.title: "I Deconstructed a 34-Point Signal and Found Everyone Missed the Real Opportunity"
item.description: "Last Thursday, a post appeared on Hacker News. 1,438 upvotes, 353 comments. A software version release announcement generating this kind of heat usually..."

item.title: "我拆了一个 34 分的信号，发现所有人都错过了真正的机会"
item.description: "上周四，Hacker News 上出现了一个帖子。1438 个赞，353 条评论。一个软件的版本发布公告能拿到这个热度，通常只有三种情况：Linux 内核、某个被所有人依赖的开源库、或者——一个包管理器升级了。"

item.title: "The 270K Star Trap: Why Copying Garry Tan’s Workflow Will Kill You Faster"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, I opened GitHub Trending and almost fell off my chair."

item.title: "27 万 Star 的陷阱：为什么复制 Garry Tan 的工作流会让你死得更快"
item.description: "项目名叫 gstack，作者是 Garry Tan——Y Combinator 的 CEO。他把自己完整的 Claude Code 工作流打包成了一个开源仓库：23 个工具，涵盖 CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师、QA 六个角色。你 clone 下来就能拥有 YC 掌门人的 AI 开发配置。"

item.title: "A 34-Point Signal That Taught Me How to Mine Gold from Noise"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, a post appeared on Hacker News: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0. 1,404 upvotes, 340 comments. The package manager Mac developers know best got a..."

item.title: "一个 34 分的信号，教会我怎么从噪音里捞金子"
item.description: "周二上午，Hacker News 上出现了一个帖子：Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0。1404 个赞，340 条评论。Mac 开发者最熟悉的包管理器迎来了大版本更新。"

item.title: "A 30-Point Signal: Why I Wrote 3,000 Words to Break It Down"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, a Show HN post appeared on Hacker News: Extend UI – open-source UI kit for modern document apps. 79 comments, 240 upvotes, score of 30."

item.title: "一个 30 分的信号，我为什么写了 3000 字来拆它"
item.description: "周二早上，Hacker News 上出现了一个 Show HN 帖子：Extend UI – open-source UI kit for modern document apps。79 条评论，240 个赞，分数 30 分。"

item.title: "A 30-Point \"Weak Signal\" — Why I Didn't Toss It"
item.description: "Tuesday at 2 AM, I was scrolling GitHub Trending and spotted a repo called datawhalechina/hello-agents. 58,543 stars, 7,163 forks, created 277 days ago."

item.title: "一个 30 分的“弱信号”，我为什么没扔掉它"
item.description: "周二凌晨两点，我刷 GitHub Trending 看到一个 repo 叫 datawhalechina/hello-agents。58543 star，7163 fork，277 天前创建。"

item.title: "Why I Spent 3 Days Before Writing About a 30-Point Signal"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, a repo called hello-agents hit GitHub Trending."

item.title: "为什么一个 30 分的信号，我花了 3 天才敢写"
item.description: "它的数字很漂亮：58,310 star，7,126 fork，276 天活跃。在 GitHub 上，star 数是注意力最直接的标尺——这个 repo 的注意力密度，几乎等于一场小型的开发者集会。"

item.title: "Vercel Built an Agent Programming Language, But the Real Opportunity Is in the Opposite Direction"
item.description: "On Tuesday afternoon, Vercel's zerolang repository on GitHub racked up 4,969 stars and 325 forks in just 26 days. Its README opens with: \"The Programming..."

item.title: "Vercel 造了个 Agent 编程语言，但真正的机会在反方向"
item.description: "周二下午，GitHub 上 Vercel 的 zerolang 仓库在 26 天内收获了 4,969 个 star 和 325 个 fork。它的 README 第一行写着：\"The Programming Language for Agents\"——给 AI Agent 用的编程语言。"

item.title: "Who's Responsible for Code Written by Your AI Assistant? A Product Opportunity Confirmed by 1,312 Comments"
item.description: "Late Tuesday night, a post appeared on the Hacker News homepage. It wasn't flashy, nor was it a traditional \"Show HN hit.\" It was just an announcement from..."

item.title: "你的 AI 助理写的代码，谁来负责？一个被 1312 条评论确认的产品机会"
item.description: "周二深夜，Hacker News 首页出现了一个帖子。它既不炫酷，也不像传统意义上的“Show HN 爆款”。它只是 Anthropic 发布的一个公告：Claude Fable 5。但不到 24 小时，它收获了 1659 个赞和 1312 条评论。"

item.title: "Claude Fable 5 Drops, and I Found an Opportunity Buried Under 3,770 Comments"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, a Hacker News post racked up 1,817 upvotes and 1,431 comments in 6 hours. It wasn't a startup launch or an open-source blowup — it was..."

item.title: "Claude Fable 5 发布后，我发现了一个被 3770 条评论淹没的机会"
item.description: "周二下午，Hacker News 上一条帖子在 6 小时内获得了 1817 个赞和 1431 条评论。这不是一个创业公司的产品发布，也不是一个开源项目的爆火——而是 Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5 的公告帖。同期，GitHub Trending 上 \"Anthropic Skills\"..."

item.title: "I Almost Missed This Direction — A 80-Score Business Hiding Inside a 30-Score Signal"
item.description: "Tuesday at 2 AM, I was staring at a GitHub Trending repo with 57,586 stars. datawhalechina/hello-agents — a Chinese tutorial teaching you how to build an AI..."

item.title: "我差点错过这个方向——30 分信号里藏着 80 分的生意"
item.description: "周二凌晨两点，我盯着 GitHub Trending 上一条 57,586 star 的仓库发呆。datawhalechina/hello-agents —— 一本中文教程，教你怎么从零开始构建 AI agent。274 天前发布的，今天又冲上了 Trending。"

item.title: "Everyone's Learning New Languages, But The Real Opportunity Is In \"Teaching It Not To Mess Up\""
item.description: "Tuesday morning, the vercel-labs/zerolang repo on GitHub hit 4,925 stars in 24 days. The tagline: \"The Programming Language for Agents.\""

item.title: "大家都在学新语言，真正的机会却在“教它别犯错”"
item.description: "周二上午，GitHub 上 vercel-labs/zerolang 这个 repo 在 24 天内拿下了 4925 个 star。项目简介写着“The Programming Language for Agents”——给 AI agent 用的编程语言。"

item.title: "From a 28-Point Signal to a $19/Month Opportunity: My Complete Thought Process Deconstructing Kyushu"
item.description: "At 2 AM on a Tuesday, a project appeared on Hacker News with only 28 comments. By my scoring system, it scored exactly 28 points — just barely crossing the..."

item.title: "从 28 分信号挖到 $19/月机会：我拆解 Kyushu 的完整思考过程"
item.description: "周二凌晨 2 点，Hacker News 上出现了一个只有 28 条评论的项目。按我的打分系统，它只得了 28 分——刚好超过触发行动线的门槛。但就是这条\"擦边球\"信号，让我在 3 小时内锁定了一个明确的 $19/月产品机会。"

item.title: "I Dug Through a Bunch of 30-Point Signals and Found a $29/Month Product Opportunity — Full Breakdown"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, I was scanning GitHub Trending and spotted a repo with a score of just 30 — cross-platform verification scored 1, buyer clarity scored 1...."

item.title: "从 30 分的信号里，我挖出了 $29/月的产品机会——完整拆解"
item.description: "周二凌晨，我在扫 GitHub Trending 时看到一个 repo 分数只有 30 分——跨平台验证 1 分，买家清晰度 1 分，照理说应该直接跳过。但当天的 Top 15 信号里，有 9 个 repo 都在做同一件事：给 AI agent..."

item.title: "Your Local Dev Environment Is Holding AI Back — A $29/Month Cloud CLI Opportunity"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, a Show HN post on Hacker News caught the attention of 241 developers. Not a new AI model, not a new programming language — something that..."

item.title: "你的本地开发环境正在拖 AI 的后腿——一个 $29/月的云 CLI 机会"
item.description: "周二下午，Hacker News 上一个 Show HN 帖子吸引了 241 个开发者的注意。不是新的 AI 模型，不是新的编程语言，而是一个听起来有点反直觉的东西：Boxes.dev——\"扔掉 localhost，在云端跑 Claude Code 和 Codex\"。"

item.title: "Your Local Environment Is Killing Your AI Agent: Deconstructing a 34-Point Signal"
item.description: "Early Tuesday morning, a Show HN post on Hacker News racked up 97 upvotes and 72 comments in 6 hours. The title: \"Boxes.dev: ditch localhost; run Claude..."

item.title: "你的本地环境正在杀死你的 AI Agent：一个 34 分信号的拆解"
item.description: "周二凌晨，Hacker News 上一个 Show HN 帖子在 6 小时内获得了 97 个赞和 72 条评论。帖子的标题是：“Boxes.dev: ditch localhost; run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud”。"

item.title: "62 Comments Tell Me: Local Dev Environments Are Becoming the Bottleneck for AI Coding"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, a Show HN post caught my eye on Hacker News. A project called Boxes.dev, 62 comments, 85 upvotes. The title: \"ditch localhost; run Claude..."

item.title: "62 条评论告诉我：本地开发环境正在成为 AI 编程的瓶颈"
item.description: "周二早上，Hacker News 上一个 Show HN 帖子引起了我的注意。一个叫 Boxes.dev 的项目，62 条评论，85 个赞。标题是：\"ditch localhost; run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud\"——抛弃本地环境，在云端运行 Claude..."

item.title: "17.9K Star Agent Framework Hides a Niche but Profitable Opportunity"
item.description: "Yesterday, 3 agent-related projects simultaneously hit GitHub Trending, one with 179K stars. Everyone's fixated on \"making AI write code,\" but I found a..."

item.title: "17.9 万 Star 的 Agent 框架，藏着一个小众但能赚钱的机会"
item.description: "昨天 GitHub 上 3 个 Agent 相关项目同时冲上 Trending 总榜，其中一个 17.9 万 Star。所有人都盯着“让 AI 写代码”，但我在 488 条 HN 评论里发现了一个完全不同的信号——有人愿意为“控制 AI 不犯错”每月付 $1,500。"

item.title: "Your \"AI Agent\" Is Burning Cash — Uber's $1,500/Month Cap Is the Final Warning"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, a post on Hacker News titled \"Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing\" racked up 504 comments and 392..."

item.title: "你的“AI Agent”正在帮你烧钱，Uber 的 $1,500/月上限是最后的警报"
item.description: "周二下午，Hacker News 上一个帖子《Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing》引起了 504 条评论和 392 个赞。同一时间，GitHub 上 NousResearch/hermes-agent 以..."

item.title: "How I Found a $29 Opportunity From a 30-Point Signal That 99% of Builders Missed"
item.description: "This is precisely where methodology teaching is most valuable: Not every high-score signal is worth pursuing, but every low-score signal might contain gold."

item.title: "我如何从一个 30 分的信号中发现了一个被 99% 的 Builder 忽略的赚钱方向"
item.description: "> Slug: how-i-found-a-dollar29-opportunity-from-a-30-point-signal"

item.title: "Everyone’s Chasing AI Agents, But the Real Opportunity Is in “Anti-Agent” Tools"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, I opened GitHub Trending and spotted a project called CodexPlusPlus — 11,591 stars in 27 days. That’s not unusual in itself — AI tool..."

item.title: "大家都在追 AI Agent，但真正的机会在“反 Agent”工具"
item.description: "周二下午，我打开 GitHub Trending，看到一个叫 CodexPlusPlus 的项目，27 天拿了 11,591 个 star。这本身不奇怪——AI 工具项目拿 star 跟喝水一样。奇怪的是它的描述：“An enhanced tool for CodexApp, striving to make..."

item.title: "11,536 Discussions Are All About Codex Enhancements, But I'm More Interested in the Signal That \"Only Has 1 Platform\""
item.description: "Early Tuesday morning, a Rust project appeared on GitHub Trending."

item.title: "11,536 个讨论都在说 Codex 增强，但我更关心那个\"只有 1 个平台\"的信号"
item.description: "它叫 BigPizzaV3/CodexPlusPlus，描述写得很朴素——\"让 Codex 变得更好用\"。10834 个 star，26 天，没有出现在 Hacker News，没有出现在 Reddit，没有出现在 Lobsters。"

item.title: "I Dug a Product Line Out of a 28-Point Signal — Full Breakdown"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, I spotted a number on GitHub Trending: gsd-build/get-shit-done, 63,814 stars, 5,433 forks, in just 169 days."

item.title: "我从一个 28 分的信号里，挖出了一条产品线——完整拆解"
item.description: "周二下午，我在 GitHub Trending 上看到了一个数字：gsd-build/get-shit-done，63,814 个 star，5,433 个 fork，只用了 169 天。"

item.title: "A Self-Hosted AI Workspace Exploded to 8000+ Stars on GitHub Overnight — Here's What I Saw"
item.description: "Tuesday night, I refreshed the GitHub Trending page and a repo stopped me cold."

item.title: "一个自建 AI 工作台在 GitHub 一夜暴涨 8000+ Star，我看到了什么"
item.description: "pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus：Self-hosted AI workspace。8 小时前发布，8181 个 star，1163 个 fork。"

item.title: "Your AI Workspace Needs a New Home: The Signal Behind Odysseus's 8,800 Stars Overnight"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, I was scrolling through GitHub Trending and froze. A project called Odysseus had racked up 8,800 stars in under 24 hours. 8,800. That..."

item.title: "你的 AI 工作台该搬家了：Odysseus 一夜 8800 Star 背后的信号"
item.description: "周二上午，我刷到 GitHub Trending 时愣了一下。一个叫 Odysseus 的项目，在不到 24 小时内拿了 8800 个 star。8800。这数字在 JavaScript 项目里不是没见过，但一个 self-hosted AI workspace 能涨成这样？我点了进去。"

item.title: "Everyone's Copying Garry Tan's 23 Agent Tools — But the Real Opportunity Is in the Opposite Direction"
item.description: "Tuesday morning, a repo hit GitHub Trending: garrytan/gstack. 104,981 stars, 15,653 forks, 80 days."

item.title: "大家都在学 Garry Tan 的 23 个 Agent 工具，但真正的机会在反方向"
item.description: "周二早上，GitHub Trending 上出现了一个仓库：garrytan/gstack。104,981 个 star，15,653 个 fork，80 天。"

item.title: "52K Stars Open-Source CapCut Alternative: Why Aren't CapCut Creators Paying Yet?"
item.description: "Tuesday afternoon, OpenCut's star count on GitHub Trending hit 52,075. I stared at that number for three seconds, then checked its fork count — 5,648. The..."

item.title: "5.2 万星的开源 CapCut 替代品，为什么剪映创作者还没开始付钱？"
item.description: "周二下午，GitHub Trending 上 OpenCut 的星数跳到了 52,075。我盯着这个数字看了三秒，又回去看了眼它的 fork 数——5,648，341 天前创建的仓库，意味着平均每天 153 个新 star。如果你对 GitHub 生态不敏感，这个数字可能听起来就是个\"又一个开源项目火了\"的故事。"

item.title: Hello, AimFast.Dev
item.description: Welcome to aimfast.dev — your daily signal intelligence for indie developers. This is a sample article demonstrating the MDX publishing pipeline.
